title: 4 PCS Mesh Laundry Wash Bag, 60x50cm/50x40cm Large Fine Laundry Bags with Zips Reusable Washing Machine Wash Bag for Clothes, Socks, Underwear, Bra (L+M, White)
features: Quantity: 4 pieces laundry bags, 2*large size, 2*medium size, great for washing clothes, jeans, underwear, socks, shoes and other household clothing.
Size: Washing machine bag's large size is about 60*50cm / 23.6*19.6 inches, medium size is approx. 50*40 cm/ 19.6*15.7 inches. Different sizes can meet your diversified needs.
Durable & Reusable: Washing bags for laundry are made of tight mesh with small holes, breathable and clean. Soap and water easily through the mesh for optimal cleaning.
Protect Garments: Our mesh laundry ba protects your garments from tangling, snagging, or pulling in washer or dryer, which also reduces the chance of colors bleeding into each other.
Wide Application: Mesh bags for laundry not only for washing machine, but also work as Storage organizer when travelling, keep clothes in order, and make everything easier.
description: Product Description Color: white Material: polyester Quantity: 4 PCS, 2 sizes Large size: 23.6*19.6 inches Medium size: 19.6*15.7 inches Strong and Durable Zipper Design with premium zipper, durable and strong, Say goodbye to the snagging and knotting problems of the clothes. Fine stitch and weave Fine stitch and weave ensures long lasting performance for repeated use, honeycomb mesh ensures soap and water flow through mesh holes easily. Protect Garments protects your garments from tangling, snagging, or pulling in washer or dryer, which also reduces the chance of colors bleeding into each other. Organize your Clothes Our mesh laundry bags can be used as travel bag, keep your clothes in place and tidy, save your luggage case much space. Different Size for What? Large size can hold down jacket, cotton wadded jacket and sheet.
